name: ConnectionLibraryApi
summary: Connection Rest API 3.0 — ConnectionLibrary endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: GetDesignSetsAsync
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of design sets available for the user.
methods.remarks: This method returns a collection of design sets that are mappedand ready for use. It throws an exception if no design setsare available for the user.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ProposeAsync
methods.signature: Task<List<ConDesignItem>> ProposeAsync(Guid projectId, int connectionId, ConConnectionLibrarySearchParameters conConnectionLibrarySearchParameters)
methods.summary: Proposes a list of design items for a specified connection within a project.
methods.remarks: This method retrieves the connection model from the specifiedproject and classifies its typology. It then filters andproposes design items based on the connection's typology and design code.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the project containing the connection.

params.name: connectionId
params.doc: The identifier of the connection for which design items are proposed.

params.name: conConnectionLibrarySearchParameters
params.doc: Parameters used to filter and refine the search for proposed connection design items, such as set membership and required connection features.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetTemplateAsync
methods.summary: Retrieves the template associated with the specified design set and design item.
methods.remarks: This method is mapped to API version 2 and produces a plain textresponse. It is intended to be used in scenarios where thetemplate of a design item needs to be retrieved for further processing or n display.

params.name: designSetId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the design set.

params.name: designItemId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the design item for which the template is requested.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetDesignItemPictureAsync
methods.summary: Retrieves the picture associated with the specified design item as a PNG image.
methods.remarks: This method is mapped to API version 2 and produces a PNG image.The image is returned as a file stream result with the filename set to the design item's ID.

params.name: designSetId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the design set.

params.name: designItemId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the design item for which the template is requested.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.summary: Publish template to Private or Company set

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
